findings.location: s1 — 大量データの定義の注意書き
findings.description: The knowledge file adds the parenthetical "（取得開始位置ではなく取得件数が基準）" to the definition, but this phrasing has no basis in the source. The source's parenthetical is "(検索対象のテーブルの件数ではない)" — meaning the result count (not the table size) is what matters. The knowledge file replaces "table count vs result count" with "starting position vs count", which is a misrepresentation derived from a code example, not from the definition itself.
findings.source_evidence: 大量データの取得とは、SELECT文の結果として取得されるデータ件数(検索対象のテーブルの件数ではない)が大量であることをさす。

findings.description: DbAccessSupport is referenced in the source code for this section (the class extends DbAccessSupport and uses getSqlPStatement which is inherited from it), but is absent from s3's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: public class CM311AC1Component extends DbAccessSupport { ... SqlPStatement statement = getSqlPStatement("REGISTER_USER"); }
